g.text: Current runtime: DB commit then Kafka publish
danger window: durable order exists, but durable command does not

text.tspan: Without an outbox, step 7 and step 10 are two separate durability boundaries.
If step 7 succeeds but step 10 fails, the order is already stored, but the async follow-up is lost.
Retry only replays the existing pending order; it does not recreate the missing command safely.

g.text: request path before the dangerous gap
11. timeout / broker error after DB commit
